name: Buffalo Style Chicken Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Slowly melt butter in a large saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add the red hot sauce (3 Tbsp for mild, 4 Tbsp for hotter) and vinegar to the melted butter. Remove from heat.
3. Heat oil in a large heavy frying pan to about 370°F (190°C).
4. Deep-fry wings, a few at a time until nicely browned and crisp, about 10 to 15 minutes. Remove to a paper-towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
5. Reheat the sauce in the saucepan over medium heat.
6. Add the fried wings to the saucepan and toss to coat evenly.
7. If desired, run the wings under the broiler for 3 to 5 minutes until crisp again.
8. Transfer the wings to a platter.
